description: Modules for interacting with cloud storage and service APIs.

modules.name: dropbox-utils
modules.description: A set of utilities to interact with the Dropbox API for file management using OAuth 2.

functions.name: dropboxService.init
functions.description: Initializes the Dropbox service with your app's Client ID.

functions.name: dropboxService.signIn
functions.description: Redirects the user to Dropbox to authorize the application.

functions.name: dropboxService.handleRedirect
functions.description: Call this on page load to handle the OAuth redirect and capture the access token.

functions.name: dropboxService.signOut
functions.description: Signs the user out by revoking the access token.

functions.name: dropboxService.isSignedIn
functions.description: Checks if the user currently has an access token.

functions.name: dropboxService.listFiles
functions.description: Lists files and folders in a given path (e.g., '' for root).

functions.name: dropboxService.uploadFile
functions.description: Uploads a file to a specified path in Dropbox.

functions.name: dropboxService.deleteFile
functions.description: Deletes a file or folder at a specified path.
